description: Murakumo Vision (qwen3-vl-8b) analysis output. Holds metadata only — the source image + raw analysis JSON live in a DataLad-managed dataset pinned to IPFS (per ADR-2605241500). The `payloadRef` discriminator names which storage backend holds the payload. Per maps CLAUDE.md §Vision Intelligence + Phase 3 Tier B (ADR-2605231400).

subjectUri.description: AT URI of the feature being analyzed (e.g., a Building or SatelliteScene record).

analysisKind.description: What kind of analysis produced this result.

entities.description: Small inline entity list (≤ 32 items, ≤ 16KB total). Larger result sets live in `payloadRef`.

confidenceX10000.description: Aggregate confidence for the overall analysis × 10000 (0..10000 = 0.0000..1.0000).

payloadKind.description: How the full payload (source image + raw JSON output) is stored. `datalad-pin` references an com.etzhayyim.substrate.datasetPin record per ADR-2605241500.

datasetPinUri.description: When payloadKind=datalad-pin, AT URI of the corresponding com.etzhayyim.substrate.datasetPin record.

datasetPath.description: Relative path inside the DataLad subdataset (e.g., 'qwen3-vl-8b/2026-05-23/r0001.json').

payloadCid.description: Raw IPFS CID when payloadKind=ipfs (no DataLad superdataset).

externalUrl.description: Source URL when payloadKind=external-url (avoid for new records — substrate-purity dictates DataLad+IPFS).

inlineJson.description: Inline payload when small (<16KB) and payloadKind=inline.

entity.description: One detected/recognized entity inside a visionResult.entities[].
